metadata.description: PSE Moderator Comparison + Causal Mediation with Quadrant Diagnostics

examples.output: {"outcome": "v2jucomp", "mediator": "pse_share_period", "n_obs": 25, "n_countries": 25, "estimation": "cross_sectional_OLS_no_country_FE", "caveat": "All PSE obs are period_start=2015; within-country demeaning collapses T\u21920. Cross-sectional mediation using level education\u00d7gini\u00d7(\u2212socprot) as exposure. Captures cross-country differences, not within-country changes.", "total_effect_c": -0.595189, "total_effect_c_p": 0.0189, "a_coef_T_to_M": 541.502003, "a_p": 0.3518, "b_coef_M_to_Y": -0.00026, "b_p": 0.9886, "direct_effect_cp": -0.454374, "direct_effect_cp_p": 0.0434, "acme": -0.140815, "acme_ci_95": [-0.508853, 0.121803], "n_bootstrap_valid": 1000, "bootstrap_unstable": false, "proportion_mediated": 0.2366, "baron_kenny_satisfied": false}

examples.input: Quadrant missing-data table: PSE coverage by (highGini × highSocProt) quadrant
examples.output: {"quadrant_coverage_table": {"highGini=0_highSocProt=0": {"n_observations": 19, "n_with_pse": 2, "pse_coverage_pct": 10.5, "countries": ["BGD", "BLR", "LBR", "MDA", "MDV", "MKD", "MLI", "MNE", "NGA", "NPL", "SRB", "STP", "VEN"]}, "highGini=0_highSocProt=1": {"n_observations": 62, "n_with_pse": 10, "pse_coverage_pct": 16.1, "countries": ["ALB", "AUT", "BEL", "CAN", "CYP", "CZE", "DEU", "DNK", "ESP", "EST", "FIN", "FRA", "GBR", "GEO", "GRC", "HRV", "HUN", "IRL", "ISL", "ISR", "ITA", "JPN", "LTU", "LUX", "LVA", "MLT", "MNE", "MNG", "NLD", "NOR", "POL", "PRT", "ROU", "SVN", "SWE", "THA", "UKR", "URY"]}, "highGini=1_highSocProt=0": {"n_observations": 62, "n_with_pse": 7, "pse_coverage_pct": 11.3, "countries": ["BEN", "BFA", "BIH", "BOL", "BTN", "BWA", "CIV", "COL", "CPV", "DOM", "ECU", "GHA", "GMB", "GNB", "GTM", "HND", "IDN", "IND", "JAM", "KEN", "LKA", "LSO", "MDG", "MWI", "MYS", "NAM", "NGA", "PAN", "PER", "PHL", "PRY", "SEN", "SLE", "SLV", "SUR", "TUN", "VUT", "ZAF", "ZMB"]}, "highGini=1_highSocProt=1": {"n_observations": 18, "n_with_pse": 6, "pse_coverage_pct": 33.3, "countries": ["ARG", "BGR", "BRA", "CHL", "CRI", "FJI", "GEO", "MEX", "PAN", "THA", "URY", "USA"]}}, "n_total_complete_panel": 161, "n_with_pse": 25, "n_mediation_sample": 25, "key_finding": "Reports PSE data coverage % in each (highGini\u00d7highSocProt) quadrant. Critical concern if low-SocProt/high-Gini cell has <30% PSE coverage."}

examples.input: Path (a): Does lagged LDem reduce Gini? (Gini←LDem reverse causality)
examples.output: {"path_a_description": "Regress gini on lagged LDem (country FE + period FE)", "n_obs": 65, "beta_ldem_on_gini": -22.973972, "p_value": 0.6439, "reverse_causality_concern": false, "interpretation": "Significant negative effect means democracies reduce inequality; if so, Gini is endogenous to LDem and must be instrumented or sample restricted."}

examples.input: Synthesis of all analyses: opportunity cost channel, mediation, sensitivity, reverse causality
examples.output: (1) OppCost channel: SocProt β₇=-0.0017 (p=0.2481), PSE β₇=-0.0006 (p=0.548), opportunity-cost confirmed=NO; (2) Baron-Kenny mediation via judicial compliance: satisfied=False; (3) ACME extreme-values bound survives=True; (4) Reverse causality Gini←LDem concern=False.
